nodes.label: Eleasah
nodes.description: A descendant of king Saul (1 Chr. 8:37; 9:43).

nodes.label: Eliphelet
nodes.description: A descendant of king Saul through Jonathan (1 Chr. 8:39).

verses.text: And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, an hundred and fifty. All these are of the sons of Benjamin.
